mapper.sql:
p.id, p.slug, p.frontend_id, p.title_en, p.title_zh, p.difficulty, COALESCE(array_to_string(p.tag_values, E'
'), '') AS tag_values_text, COALESCE(array_to_string(p.tag_labels_en, E'
'), '') AS tag_labels_en_text, COALESCE(array_to_string(p.tag_labels_zh, E'
'), '') AS tag_labels_zh_text, p.content_markdown_en, p.content_markdown_zh, p.leetcode_url, p.sample_test_case, p.python3_template, p.source_commit

where.if: AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM problem_category_item pci JOIN problem_category pc ON pc.id = pci.category_id WHERE pci.problem_id = p.id AND (pc.slug = #{category} OR pc.name = #{category}) )

mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM problem p
ORDER BY p.frontend_id DESC NULLS LAST, p.id DESC
ORDER BY p.title_en ASC, p.frontend_id ASC NULLS LAST, p.id ASC
ORDER BY p.title_zh ASC, p.frontend_id ASC NULLS LAST, p.id ASC
ORDER BY p.updated_at DESC, p.id DESC
ORDER BY p.frontend_id ASC NULLS LAST, p.id ASC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT p.difficulty AS value, p.difficulty AS label, COUNT(*) AS problem_count FROM problem p WHERE p.difficulty IS NOT NULL AND p.difficulty != '' GROUP BY p.difficulty ORDER BY p.difficulty ASC

SELECT t.tag AS value, MIN(t.label) AS label, COUNT(*) AS problem_count FROM problem p CROSS JOIN LATERAL unnest( p.tag_values, CASE WHEN #{locale} = 'en-US' THEN p.tag_labels_en ELSE p.tag_labels_zh END ) AS t(tag, label) WHERE t.tag IS NOT NULL AND t.tag != '' GROUP BY t.tag ORDER BY MIN(t.label) ASC, t.tag ASC

SELECT pc.slug, pc.name, COUNT(pci.problem_id) AS problem_count FROM problem_category pc LEFT JOIN problem_category_item pci ON pci.category_id = pc.id GROUP BY pc.id, pc.slug, pc.name ORDER BY pc.name ASC, pc.slug ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO problem ( slug, frontend_id, title_en, title_zh, difficulty, tag_values, tag_labels_en, tag_labels_zh, content_markdown_en, content_markdown_zh, leetcode_url, sample_test_case, python3_template, source_commit, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{slug}, #{frontendId}, #{titleEn}, #{titleZh}, #{difficulty}, #{tagValues}, #{tagLabelsEn}, #{tagLabelsZh}, #{contentMarkdownEn}, #{contentMarkdownZh}, #{leetcodeUrl}, #{sampleTestCase}, #{python3Template}, #{sourceCommit}, NOW(), NOW() ) ON CONFLICT (slug) DO UPDATE SET frontend_id = EXCLUDED.frontend_id, title_en = EXCLUDED.title_en, title_zh = EXCLUDED.title_zh, difficulty = EXCLUDED.difficulty, tag_values = EXCLUDED.tag_values, tag_labels_en = EXCLUDED.tag_labels_en, tag_labels_zh = EXCLUDED.tag_labels_zh, content_markdown_en = EXCLUDED.content_markdown_en, content_markdown_zh = EXCLUDED.content_markdown_zh, leetcode_url = EXCLUDED.leetcode_url, sample_test_case = EXCLUDED.sample_test_case, python3_template = EXCLUDED.python3_template, source_commit = EXCLUDED.source_commit, updated_at = NOW()
